mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM drone WHERE deleted = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND model LIKE CONCAT('%', #{model}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM drone WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drone ( name, model, serial_number, manufacturer, type, weight, max_speed, max_altitude, endurance, range_distance, max_payload, camera_type, battery_capacity, gps_accuracy, operating_temperature, waterproof_level, status, description, purchase_date, ai_generated, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{model}, #{serialNumber}, #{manufacturer}, #{type}, #{weight}, #{maxSpeed}, #{maxAltitude}, #{endurance}, #{rangeDistance}, #{maxPayload}, #{cameraType}, #{batteryCapacity}, #{gpsAccuracy}, #{operatingTemperature}, #{waterproofLevel}, #{status}, #{description}, #{purchaseDate}, #{aiGenerated}, #{deleted}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE drone SET name = #{name}, model = #{model}, serial_number = #{serialNumber}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, type = #{type}, weight = #{weight}, max_speed = #{maxSpeed}, max_altitude = #{maxAltitude}, endurance = #{endurance}, range_distance = #{rangeDistance}, max_payload = #{maxPayload}, camera_type = #{cameraType}, battery_capacity = #{batteryCapacity}, gps_accuracy = #{gpsAccuracy}, operating_temperature = #{operatingTemperature}, waterproof_level = #{waterproofLevel}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, purchase_date = #{purchaseDate}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE drone SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM drone WHERE deleted = 0
AND name LIKE '%' || #{name} || '%'
AND model LIKE '%' || #{model} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM drone WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drone ( name, model, serial_number, manufacturer, type, weight, max_speed, max_altitude, endurance, range_distance, max_payload, camera_type, battery_capacity, gps_accuracy, operating_temperature, waterproof_level, status, description, purchase_date, ai_generated, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{model}, #{serialNumber}, #{manufacturer}, #{type}, #{weight}, #{maxSpeed}, #{maxAltitude}, #{endurance}, #{rangeDistance}, #{maxPayload}, #{cameraType}, #{batteryCapacity}, #{gpsAccuracy}, #{operatingTemperature}, #{waterproofLevel}, #{status}, #{description}, #{purchaseDate}, #{aiGenerated}, #{deleted}, datetime(''now''), datetime(''now'') )
mapper.update: UPDATE drone SET name = #{name}, model = #{model}, serial_number = #{serialNumber}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, type = #{type}, weight = #{weight}, max_speed = #{maxSpeed}, max_altitude = #{maxAltitude}, endurance = #{endurance}, range_distance = #{rangeDistance}, max_payload = #{maxPayload}, camera_type = #{cameraType}, battery_capacity = #{batteryCapacity}, gps_accuracy = #{gpsAccuracy}, operating_temperature = #{operatingTemperature}, waterproof_level = #{waterproofLevel}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, purchase_date = #{purchaseDate}, update_time = datetime(''now'') WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE drone SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
